name: Guardian Roofing
tagline: Sonoma County's go-to roofers for re-roofs, repairs & new construction
seoDescription: Guardian Roofing LLC is a family-owned, GAF-certified roofing contractor in Santa Rosa, CA. Re-roofs, repairs, new construction & inspections in Sonoma County.

sections.heading: GAF-certified Sonoma County roofing, with owner John on every job
sections.subheading: Family-owned and GAF-certified, Guardian Roofing handles re-roofs, repairs, new construction, and inspections across Santa Rosa and beyond.
badges: Family-owned and locally operated in Santa Rosa

sections.heading: Roofing services for homes and businesses

items.title: Re-Roofing
items.description: Full residential and commercial re-roofs designed to improve your home's value and energy efficiency, with quality materials and a clean, careful install.

items.title: Roof Repair & Maintenance
items.description: We inspect your damaged roof, send a detailed quote, and provide a long-lasting repair so small problems don't become big ones.

items.title: New Construction Roofing
items.description: Reliable roofing for new residential and commercial builds, installed to last from the first layer of underlayment up.

items.title: Roof Inspections
items.description: Thorough inspections to assess the condition of your roof and give you an honest, detailed assessment of what it needs.

items.title: GAF Shingle & Solar Shingle Systems
items.description: As a GAF-certified installer, we offer GAF shingle systems — including solar shingle installation — backed by GAF's System Plus Limited Warranty on qualifying roofs.

items.title: Metal & TPO Flat Roofing
items.description: For homes and commercial buildings we install metal roofing and TPO single-ply membrane, a cost-effective, high-performance option for low-slope and flat roofs.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Guardian Roofing and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

sections.heading: About Guardian Roofing
body: Guardian Roofing is a family-owned, licensed roofing company serving Santa Rosa and the wider Sonoma County area. Owner John was born and raised in Sonoma County and has been roofing since around 2010, spending a decade with a local family-owned roofer before studying nights to earn his contractor's license and launch Guardian Roofing in 2019.

John runs every job as the on-site project manager, while his wife Heather keeps customers informed from the office — an approach that has earned the company consistent five-star reviews. As a GAF-certified installer, Guardian is your go-to for re-roofs, new construction, repairs, and inspections.
highlights: Family-owned and locally operated in Santa Rosa
GAF-certified installer (System Plus Limited Warranty on qualifying systems)
Owner John is on-site as your project manager

items.quote: John is not only the Owner but also the Project Manager who was on-site for the entirety of the roof install. He is a person of integrity, demands quality, and is highly skilled in his craft. His estimate was very reasonable and he communicated well with me
The owner, John, was prompt, informative and on site doing great work, and his wife Heather in the office was always cheerful, informative and responsive.

John and his team were very professional and best of all kept me informed of their progress and involved me in the decision making process by providing me alternatives that fit my budget. I would highly recommend them to all of my friends.

items.title: Family-Owned And Locally Operated In Santa Rosa
items.body: Rooted right here in Santa Rosa, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

items.title: GAF-Certified Installer (System Plus Limited
items.body: Properly credentialed, so the work is covered and done to standard.

items.title: Owner John Is On-Site As Your Project Manager
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: Licensed Roofing Contractor — CSLB License
items.body: Properly credentialed, so the work is covered and done to standard.

items.title: 5.0-Star Rated On HomeAdvisor/Angi And A+
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: Free, Detailed Project Estimates
items.body: Clear, honest pricing up front — no surprises on the final bill.

sections.heading: Work with Guardian Roofing
sections.body: Find us at 2210 Dennis Ln. Call (707) 843-3526 — we’re glad to help.
